presets.name: Movie One-Sheet (Rule of Thirds)
presets.background: cinematic movie one-sheet poster, full-bleed key art, dramatic graded lighting, theatrical mood

boxes.desc: full-bleed key art: the lead characters composed on the upper two-thirds, strong silhouette and depth
tagline in small caps, centered just above the title
film title, large condensed display type across the lower third
release line, e.g. 'IN THEATERS DECEMBER', centered under the title
billing block: dense condensed credits and studio logos along the very bottom

presets.name: Teaser (Centered Title)
presets.background: minimal teaser poster, vast negative space, single iconic symbol, restrained palette

boxes.desc: intrigue tagline centered near the top
single iconic object or logo centered in the negative space, the whole concept in one symbol
title centered in the lower third, lots of tracking, understated
minimal billing block and release date along the bottom

presets.name: Cast-Heavy (Bottom Billing Block)
presets.background: ensemble cast movie poster, multiple faces composited in the upper area, dramatic key lighting

boxes.desc: ensemble key art filling the top two-thirds, the cast arranged in a balanced composite
dense billing block: a row of cast names in talent boxes above tiny condensed crew credits and studio logos

presets.name: Gig / Event (Date + Venue)
presets.background: bold typographic gig poster, screen-print look, limited high-contrast palette, energetic

boxes.desc: the headliner name as huge type dominating the top third, the loudest element on the poster
central screen-printed illustration or artist photo, halftone treatment
support acts / lineup in a smaller secondary size
date and venue line, bold and unmissable
ticket info, age policy and sponsor logos along the bottom
